values.value: Connected actions detected: project has a related federal approval within 10 miles or shares purpose/timeline. Must either scope connected actions together or document independent utility. Cumulative impacts section (40 CFR 1508.7) required. This is the #1 NEPA litigation failure mode in the PermitTEC corpus (42.7% of challenged EIS/EA decisions cite inadequate cumulative analysis). Citation: 40 CFR 1508.25(a)(1); 40 CFR 1502.16.
